sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using PlaceAI ('the App'), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the App. These terms apply to all users, including visitors and registered users.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Service
sections.content: PlaceAI is a placement preparation application that provides interview questions, company information, AI-powered tips, and preparation guidance. The content is for educational purposes only and does not guarantee placement outcomes.

sections.heading: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: You may be required to create an account to access certain features. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable Use
sections.content: You agree not to: (a) use the App for any unlawful purpose; (b) reproduce, distribute, or sell the content without permission; (c) attempt to reverse engineer or hack the App; (d) use automated tools to scrape or collect data; (e) impersonate other users or entities.

sections.heading: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content in PlaceAI, including questions, answers, tips, and designs, is the property of PlaceAI and is protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws. You may use the content solely for personal, non-commercial preparation purposes.

sections.heading: 6. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: PlaceAI is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information. Placement outcomes depend on many factors beyond the App's content.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, PlaceAI and its creators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the App, including but not limited to missed job opportunities.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be posted in the App. Your continued use after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.

sections.heading: 9. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of India. Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of the App shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in India.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these Terms, contact us at: legal@placeai.app

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect: (a) Account information: name, email address when you register. (b) Usage data: questions attempted, scores, time spent, companies viewed. (c) Device information: device type, OS version, app version for analytics and debugging. (d) Preferences: saved companies, bookmarked questions.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to: (a) Provide and improve the App experience. (b) Personalize content and recommendations. (c) Track your preparation progress. (d) Send relevant notifications (with your consent). (e) Analyze usage patterns to improve the App. (f) Respond to support requests.

sections.heading: 3. Data Storage and Security
sections.content: Your data is stored securely on servers. We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and at rest. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

sections.heading: 4. Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with: (a) Service providers who assist in operating the App (analytics, hosting). (b) Law enforcement when required by law. (c) Successor entities in case of merger or acquisition, with advance notice to you.

sections.heading: 5. Cookies and Analytics
sections.content: We use analytics tools to understand usage patterns. These may collect anonymized data. You can opt out of analytics in app settings. We do not use advertising cookies or track you across other websites.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to: (a) Access your personal data. (b) Correct inaccurate data. (c) Delete your account and associated data. (d) Export your data. (e) Opt out of non-essential communications. To exercise these rights, contact privacy@placeai.app.

sections.heading: 7. Children's Privacy
sections.content: PlaceAI is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we have collected such information, contact us immediately.

sections.heading: 8. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your account data as long as your account is active. Usage and progress data is retained for 2 years or until you delete your account. You can request deletion at any time.

sections.heading: 9. Third-Party Links
sections.content: The App may contain links to external sites (e.g., Glassdoor, LeetCode). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification. Your continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: 11. Contact Us
sections.content: For privacy concerns or to exercise your rights, contact: privacy@placeai.app
